"'''Galaxy's Most Wanted: Luke Skywalker, Jedi Master'''" was a [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] article published in [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]]. It was written by [[Michael Mikaelian]] and illustrated by [[Ashley Wood]].

[[File:Luke_Skywalker_G8.jpg|thumb|left|250px|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]]]
